tier: Tier 7.4g - Held-Out Policy/Action Confirmation + Reference Separation
claim: Tier 7.4g confirms the narrow C-MAPSS external/sham action-cost signal from Tier 7.4f while preserving the critical boundary that v2.4 does not separate from the prior v2.2 CRA reference with a positive paired CI. NAB remains a non-confirmation and is classified as an event-coverage gap rather than a held-out scoring bug.
caveat: Software held-out confirmation only; narrow C-MAPSS action-cost signal, not broad public usefulness, not incremental v2.4 superiority over v2.2, not a new baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
